channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Death Draws Bipartisan Condolences
item.description: The sudden death of Sen. Lindsey Graham prompted condolences from President Trump, world leaders, and lawmakers across the aisle.

item.title: Waltz says Iran is not complying with memorandum of understanding after latest U.S. strikes
item.description: U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz appeared on "This Week" following U.S. retaliatory strikes against Iran for attacking a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Senator Dick Durbin describes Lindsey Graham as a fair-minded person
item.description: Democratic Senator Dick Durbin of Illinois spoke with CBS News 24/7 about his friendship and political disagreements with the late Senator Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Archaeologists discover 3,000-year-old tomb near Luxor, Egypt
item.description: Inscriptions identified the burial site as belonging to a man named Paser.
